DataRead.SrvModNrc I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 22FE60
Reply Bytes 62FE60
Data Items
SrvModNrc.Bit 0_ Vehicle speed too highSrvModNrc.Bit 1_ Engine speed too highSrvModNrc.Bit 11_ Exhaust gas temperature too highSrvModNrc.Bit 13_ Unable to increase or stabilize the pressureSrvModNrc.Bit 2_ Permanent Power supply too lowSrvModNrc.Bit 3_ Heater Power supply too lowSrvModNrc.Bit 4_ The maximal time to activate the function is reachedSrvModNrc.Bit 5_ The minimal time between two activation is not reachedSrvModNrc.Bit 6_ The sub-system is already activatedSrvModNrc.Bit 8_ Tank temperature too highSrvModNrc.Bit 9_ Tank temperature too low (frozen urea)
